title: Workflow Mirror
description: Title slide — peer-led AI adoption for the enterprise
speakerNotes:
How many of you have been in a company that bought AI licences, ran a few workshops, and then six months later nobody was using them? [Pause let it land]

That's the problem Chico.ai exists to solve. And right now, their product tells you who isn't using AI. It does nothing to fix it.

title: The Gap
description: 40 of 500 stat — the AI adoption gap inside Chico

title: Why
description: Four customer-pain points we hear on every call

title: Root Cause
speakerNotes: "The gap isn't training. It's visibility. When AI use stays private, non-adopters have no social proof it works for their role."

title: The Bet
speakerNotes:
"Peer-led workflow sharing will activate non-adopters faster than any top-down training programme.

"If we make private AI use visible and shareable — peer to peer, role to role, opt-in and surveillance-free — non-adopters will activate at a significantly higher rate than through any training or mandate."

title: The Product
description: Workflow Feed, Workflow Capture, Nudge Bar

title: Assumptions
description: Four assumptions plus the riskiest one
speakerNotes: "That the active 40 will share at all. Before building anything, do it by hand — five conversations, five published workflows, watch whether non-adopters engage."

title: The Demo
description: Transition slide — live walk-through of Workflow Feed, Capture, and Nudge Bar

title: The Metric
description: One metric: activation rate among non-active users exposed to peer workflows
